description: Letter by Dā'ūd b. Yehuda to the Judge Eliyyahu expressing astonishment that the Nagid (i.e., Avraham Maimonides) had not sent a letter of condolence at the death of a local notable. Early 13th century. See Goitein Nachlass material. Possibly related to Bodl. MS heb. d 66/63, a letter of condolence by Shelomo b. Eliyyahu which he asks Dā'ūd b. Yehuda to pass on to the mourners.
description_he: מכתב מדאוד בן יהודה לשופט אליהו, תחילת המאה ה-13, על תמיהה שהנגיד אברהם מימוניד לא שלח מכתב ניחומים
